SEARCH
Package server.control

Class ReportController

java.lang.Object
server.control.ReportController
All Implemented Interfaces:
DomainController
public class ReportController extends Object implements DomainController
Owns the reporting domain: the Visits-by-Type and Cancellations reports the department manager runs across the region. Stateless and shared across all client threads — only the read-only DAO collaborators are held as state.

Trust boundary. Both reports are department-manager only. The role is enforced here on the server (not merely gated in the UI) by recovering the logged-in actor's Role from the ClientSession via AuthDAO.findUserById(long), exactly as ParkController guards its department-manager operations.

Both ops read the same filter from the request: a required date range (from, to, ISO yyyy-MM-dd) and an optional park (parkId). A missing park id — or the sentinel string "ALL" — is treated as the whole region.

    Reads the optional parkId filter from the request, normalising "no park" to null: a missing value, the sentinel string "ALL" (any case), or a blank string all mean the whole region.

  • Method Details

    • handledTypes

      public Set<RequestType> handledTypes()
      Returns the report-related request types handled by this controller.
      Specified by:
      handledTypes in interface DomainController
      Returns:
      supported report request types

    • handle

      public ServerResponse handle(ClientRequest request, ClientSession session)
      Processes report requests for a department manager.
      Specified by:
      handle in interface DomainController
      Parameters:
      request - client request containing report filters
      session - current client session
      Returns:
      server response containing the requested report

    • parkIdParam

      private Integer parkIdParam(ClientRequest request)
      Reads the optional parkId filter from the request, normalising "no park" to null: a missing value, the sentinel string "ALL" (any case), or a blank string all mean the whole region. A numeric value (boxed Number or its string form) is returned as an Integer.
      Parameters:
      request - the client request
      Returns:
      the requested park id, or null for the whole region

    • currentStaff

      private UserDTO currentStaff(ClientSession session)
      Recovers the staff user authenticated on this connection, for the server-side role check. Returns null unless a USER-kind actor is logged in and still resolves to a user row.
      Parameters:
      session - the per-connection session
      Returns:
      the logged-in staff user, or null if none/not a staff login
